thought: The Clock app is open and we are on the Alarm tab. To set a new alarm, I need to click the 'Add alarm' floating action button (FAB) visible at the bottom center of the screen. This will allow me to configure a new alarm for 8:25 a.m. on weekends with the specified ringtone and vibration settings.

raw_response.thought: The Clock app is open and we are on the Alarm tab. To set a new alarm, I need to click the 'Add alarm' floating action button (FAB) visible at the bottom center of the screen. This will allow me to configure a new alarm for 8:25 a.m. on weekends with the specified ringtone and vibration settings.
